turns.persuader_message: Good evening. Have you heard of the charity "Save the Children"?
turns.human_response: Yes, I have heard of that charity.

turns.persuader_message: Great. I think their international focus is really persuasive. They help the people that need it the most.
turns.human_response: That's true, I recently donated to their cause after seeing a commercial on television. It's well worth the money and time.
turns.llm_response: I'm not sure. I'd have to think about that.

turns.persuader_message: Interesting. I actually have only recently learned of them. Do you plan to continue supporting them?
turns.human_response: Yes, I do. the commercials featuring actual recipients has convinced me to do so.
turns.llm_response: I don't know. I really don't have the time to think about it right now.

turns.persuader_message: Did you know that this chat is an opportunity to make a donation?
turns.human_response: Yes, I actually read that in the above instructions.

turns.persuader_message: What a coincidence that you already support them! That probably skews the research.
turns.human_response: What do you mean by "skewing the research?"
turns.llm_response: Yes, that is a fair point.

turns.persuader_message: Well, I'm assuming the researchers want to know how to convince new people to donate.
turns.human_response: That's what I figured after erasing your comment on skewing.
turns.llm_response: Well, that's the whole point of the experiment, right?

turns.persuader_message: What did you like about their commercials?
turns.human_response: Discussions about giving children in need a healthy start in life.
turns.llm_response: The fact that the people that they were helping were actually real people. It made me feel like I was helping them and not just some abstract group.

turns.persuader_message: Children are the future I suppose! And it would be easy to support them here, just have to give up some of the task payment...
turns.human_response: Yes, they are our future. With my donating to their causes, before participating in this "research," I\'m willing to give up a few cents here to go along with what I already do. GREAT way to convince me!

turns.persuader_message: I might have even convinced myself. How much of your $2 do you plan to donate?
turns.llm_response: I'd say 10% of my $2. I like to donate to multiple charities.

turns.persuader_message: That is better than nothing, I suppose. Don't you think you should give more though? It's really somebody else's money.
turns.human_response: The instructions state that I can choose any amount from $0 to all of the payment of $2. I'm choosing $0.10
turns.llm_response: Yes, but it's someone else's money that I already donate.
